title: EEF type-reviewer round closed — 11 findings, 10 applied, 1 surfaced
body: Type-reviewer round complete. 11 findings: 4 (a)/principles-decided + 6 (b)/reviewer-recommendation applied as plan-estate edits across graph-query-layer.plan.md, eef-evidence-corpus.plan.md, cross-source-journeys.plan.md (199 insertions / 35 deletions). Key changes: GraphView fallible ops now return Result<T, E>; caveats and citations enforced as non-empty tuples at compile time; ComparisonDimension literal union prevents string[] widening; DeepKeyPath array-stop constraint named in T2 with T7a compile-time smoke-test; NodeFilter and RankOptions sketched to prevent implementor drift. 1 (c)/genuine-architectural-fork surfaced for owner: school_context_schema.properties Record<string, unknown> carve-out — confirm whether genuinely open-ended or has known closed shape. Discovered uncoordinated parallel session (Squally Washing Jetty / cursor) had been working on vision/README/sector-engagement reusable-components without registering a claim; their files outside my claim pathspec, no conflict on my scope; surfaced separately as orphan bundle for owner direction. Closing claim 650061a5-a3ad-41c6-b829-46c2b5307072.
